{{Quote|Rosion, engines full back. Break those locks.|Captain [[Joak Drysso]]|<ref name="X-Wing: The Bacta War" />}}
[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Rosion''' was the [[Chief Navigator]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' during the [[Bacta War]]. He was stationed in one of the crew pits on the ship's bridge, and as well as being in charge of plotting the ship's course in both [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight]] navigation; he was also answerable for the helm and engines.<ref name="X-Wing: The Bacta War" />
